'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 93''' was the ninety-third issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[October 8]], [[2003]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*[[Almanian Uprising|The Almania Crisis]]
*[[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]
*[[Chalmun's Spaceport Cantina/Legends|Mos Eisley Cantina]] characters
*[[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]]
*[[Byss/Legends|Byss]]
*Air and Space traffic control
*[[Widget (droid)|Widget]]
*[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker's]] [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]]
*[[A-9 Vigilance interceptor]]
